name: Reflex Plus Dog Dry Food – Lamb & Rice Hypoallergenic Light & Sterilised for Medium & Large Breeds 15kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Sterilized Adult Dog Food with Lamb & Rice is a super-premium, complete and balanced dry dog food specially formulated for sterilized, neutered, or overweight medium and large breed adult dogs. Made with highly digestible lamb protein and rice, this advanced formula helps support healthy weight management, joint health, and overall wellbeing while delivering exceptional taste.
description: Following sterilization, dogs often experience hormonal and metabolic changes that can increase the risk of weight gain. Reflex Plus Sterilized Adult provides a carefully balanced nutritional profile designed to help maintain an ideal body condition while supporting healthy muscle mass and daily energy requirements. Enriched with glucosamine and chondroitin sulfate, this formula helps support healthy joints and mobility particularly important for medium and large breed dogs as they age. Added prebiotics, antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals contribute to digestive health, immune system support, and overall vitality. Key Benefits . Specially formulated for sterilized, neutered, and overweight adult dogs . High-quality lamb protein supports lean muscle maintenance . Rice provides a highly digestible source of energy . Helps support healthy weight management and body condition . Glucosamine and chondroitin support joint health and mobility . Xylo-Oligosaccharides (XOS) help maintain digestive health and beneficial gut flora . Flaxseed provides natural Omega-3 fatty acids for healthy skin and a shiny coat . Brewer's yeast supplies essential B vitamins and supports digestion . Yucca Schidigera helps reduce stool odor naturally . Enriched with antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals to support immune health Nutritional Analysis Crude Protein: 25% Crude Fat: 13% Crude Ash: 7% Crude Fibre: 2.5% Added Vitamins Vitamin A: 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E: 150 mg/kg Vitamin C: 200 mg/kg Ingredients Processed Lamb Protein, Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Chicken Oil, Rice, Sugar Beet Pulp, Liver Flavour, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharides (XOS), Brewer's Yeast, Flaxseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Glucosamine, Chondroitin Sulfate, Antioxidants and Preservatives. Provide your sterilized dog with premium nutrition designed to support healthy weight control, strong joints, optimal digestion, and long-term vitality with Reflex Plus Lamb & Rice Sterilized Adult Dog Food.
